name_en: ❤️B Brand LolaTB Plush Wool Blend Chain Bag, crafted from Italian fine-gauge cotton and plush wool blend tweed for durability and a rich atmosphere. Inspired by the brand's signature plaid, featuring a Thomas logo and minimalist design. Beautiful adjustable gold chain strap, perfect for shoulder or crossbody wear. Magnetic flap closure, lightweight, and holds up to daily wear. Stylish and versatile.
